demographics.living_situation: lives at home with both parents

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: We were bathing our baby tonight and noticed the right side of his sack is completely flat and empty, and we're terrified it has twisted inside his body.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The parents noticed this evening during a bath that one side of the scrotum looks empty and are frightened something has gone badly wrong tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: noticed this evening during the bath
symptom_narrative.duration: first clearly noticed a few hours ago
symptom_narrative.character: the right side of the scrotum looks flat and empty and smaller than the left; nothing seems to be sitting in it
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the baby himself seems completely fine, but the parents are extremely frightened
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the right side of the scrotum / groin area
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the parents say the testicle was thought to be there before but was often hard to find
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no crying or signs of pain, no swelling, no redness; he is feeding and settling normally and does not seem hot
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the parents felt the testicle had been difficult to locate on the right side on previous occasions
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: no change in feeding, sleeping or behaviour; normal infant milestones

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: born at term with no problems reported; parents recall being told the right testicle was sometimes hard to feel

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: infant living at home with both parents; safe home environment; parents very anxious about future fertility and cancer risk

communication_style.typical_message_style: frightened parents seeking urgent reassurance after a sudden discovery during bath time

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: none — normal infant milestones, feeding and sleeping well

objective_data_offered.value: the right side of the scrotum looks flat and empty and smaller than the left side
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: parental visual observation only; the parents cannot feel where the testicle is

objective_data_offered.value: he is settled, feeding normally and does not feel hot to touch
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective parental report, no home thermometer reading taken
